series_metadata.series_description: Contains information on packages employers give to employees as incentive to leave their jobs, such as bonus and severance pay packages. The Unemployment Compensation Division makes a ruling on packages offered and maintains files of information received from employers. These records are used to determine the workers'' eligibility for Unemployment benefits.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Maintain benefit entitlement period is exhausted ; Paper: Maintain benefit entitlement period is exhausted
